perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing glasses and an off-shoulder black top, sits on the floor in front of white cabinets. She looks serious and holds a Doraemon plush toy. (2) A full-screen graphic appears with a pink background, featuring a cartoon bunny and interactive buttons for 'YES' and 'NO' regarding a channel subscription. (3) The woman reappears on screen, now smiling and gesturing with her hands as she introduces herself and begins to talk to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in a somber, low-pitched tone with minimal background noise. (2) A bright, chime-like sound effect plays as the transition graphic appears. (3) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music starts as the female voice becomes higher-pitched, energetic, and welcoming.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '但是呢' (But...), '在那時候發生了' (At that time it happened...), '一件很不好的事情' (A very bad thing...), '對我的心裡造成了很大的陰影' (Caused a big shadow in my heart). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '淑芬不受控' (Shufen is out of control), '訂閱這個頻道' (Subscribe to this channel), '開啟小鈴鐺' (Turn on the bell), 'YES', 'NO'. (3) Functional Text: 'Hello 大家好 我是淑芬' (Hello everyone, I am Shufen), '今天要來跟大家聊聊 我最近的身體健康狀況' (Today I'm going to talk about my recent health status).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator visible throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long straight dark hair, wearing round-framed glasses, an off-shoulder black crop top, and blue denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: White storage cabinets with some items visible through the glass panes; a minimalist indoor setting.

vocal_qualities.tone: Shifts from somber and serious to friendly and humorous

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This is a promotional teaser or the beginning of a YouTube vlog. The creator uses a somber 'hook' about a traumatic event to capture attention, followed by a channel subscription call-to-action, and then resets the mood to a cheerful introduction to discuss her health updates.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Specific blue lapel microphone; 'Shufen' persona identifier.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a classic 're-introduction' hook structure common in social media content to maintain high retention.
